name: QA 1400
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1400

Exercise various pcp-free(1) command options.



Copyright (c) 2019-2020 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-i386-container reproduce
